description.zh: Feature Flag 门控的 8 大隐藏功能
description.en: 8 hidden features gated by Feature Flags

content.zh:
Feature Flag 体系初始化...
编译时常量: feature('BUDDY') = true (ant build)
编译时常量: feature('KAIROS') = true
编译时常量: feature('ULTRAPLAN') = true
编译时常量: feature('DAEMON') = true
content.en:
Feature Flag system initialization...
Compile-time constant: feature('BUDDY') = true (ant build)
Compile-time constant: feature('KAIROS') = true
Compile-time constant: feature('ULTRAPLAN') = true
Compile-time constant: feature('DAEMON') = true

annotation.zh: bun:bundle 编译时门控，external 构建中 DCE 移除
annotation.en: bun:bundle compile-time gating, removed by DCE in external builds

content.zh:
检查 Buddy 宠物系统状态...
isBuddyTeaserWindow(): 2026-04-01~07 → true
物种: 18 种 (duck, goose, blob, cat, dragon...)
稀有度: common(60%) uncommon(25%) rare(10%) epic(4%) legendary(1%)
content.en:
Check Buddy pet system status...
isBuddyTeaserWindow(): 2026-04-01~07 → true
Species: 18 types (duck, goose, blob, cat, dragon...)
Rarity: common(60%) uncommon(25%) rare(10%) epic(4%) legendary(1%)

annotation.zh: Tamagotchi 风格 ASCII 宠物，愚人节彩蛋
annotation.en: Tamagotchi-style ASCII pet, April Fools' easter egg

content.zh:
用户 hash seed: mulberry32('account-uuid' + 'friend-2026-401')
生成结果: species=octopus, rarity=rare(★★★), eye=✦, hat=wizard
名字: 由模型在首次 /buddy 时生成
精灵图: 500ms tick 动画 + 气泡对话
content.en:
User hash seed: mulberry32('account-uuid' + 'friend-2026-401')
Generated: species=octopus, rarity=rare(★★★), eye=✦, hat=wizard
Name: Generated by model on first /buddy
Sprite: 500ms tick animation + bubble dialogue

annotation.zh: 确定性随机生成：同一用户永远获得同一只宠物
annotation.en: Deterministic randomization: same user always gets the same pet

content.zh:
Kairos 助手模式激活...
kairosEnabled: true (main.tsx gate check)
proactiveModule: loaded (主动循环)
channelNotification: gated by tengu_harbor
cronScheduler: enabled
autoDream: disabled (KAIROS uses disk-skill dream)
content.en:
Kairos assistant mode activated...
kairosEnabled: true (main.tsx gate check)
proactiveModule: loaded (proactive loop)
channelNotification: gated by tengu_harbor
cronScheduler: enabled
autoDream: disabled (KAIROS uses disk-skill dream)

annotation.zh: 跨会话持久化的自主助手模式，75+ 文件深度集成
annotation.en: Cross-session persistent autonomous assistant mode, 75+ files deep integration

content.zh:
/ultraplan 重构认证模块为 OAuth 2.1

检查资格: checkRemoteAgentEligibility()
模型: opus46.firstParty
超时: 30 分钟
传送到 CCR (Claude Code on the Web)...
content.en:
/ultraplan Refactor auth module to OAuth 2.1

Check eligibility: checkRemoteAgentEligibility()
Model: opus46.firstParty
Timeout: 30 minutes
Transfer to CCR (Claude Code on the Web)...

annotation.zh: Opus 模型驱动的远程深度规划

content.zh:
◇ ultraplan · Starting Claude Code on the web…

远程会话已创建，状态机:
running → needs_input → plan_ready

轮询中... (pollForApprovedExitPlanMode)
用户可在浏览器中编辑和审批方案
content.en:
◇ ultraplan · Starting Claude Code on the web…

Remote session created, state machine:
running → needs_input → plan_ready

Polling... (pollForApprovedExitPlanMode)
User can edit and approve plan in browser

annotation.zh: 30 分钟远程规划 + 方案审批

content.zh:
Undercover 模式检查...
USER_TYPE: 'ant'
repo remote: github.com/user/public-project
getRepoClassCached(): 'external'
isUndercover(): true ← 自动激活

注入指令: NEVER include internal model codenames
content.en:
Undercover mode check...
USER_TYPE: 'ant'
repo remote: github.com/user/public-project
getRepoClassCached(): 'external'
isUndercover(): true ← Auto-activated

Injected instruction: NEVER include internal model codenames

annotation.zh: 开源贡献安全防护，防泄露 Capybara/Tengu 等内部代号
annotation.en: Open-source contribution safety protection, prevent leaking Capybara/Tengu internal codenames

content.zh:
Daemon 守护进程模式...
claude daemon start
├── supervisor: PID 12345
├── worker[remoteControl]: --daemon-worker
│   └── runBridgeHeadless(): no TUI, IPC auth
└── worker[cron]: filter(t => t.permanent)
SessionKind: 'daemon' | 'daemon-worker'
content.en:
Daemon mode...
claude daemon start
├── supervisor: PID 12345
├── worker[remoteControl]: --daemon-worker
│   └── runBridgeHeadless(): no TUI, IPC auth
└── worker[cron]: filter(t => t.permanent)
SessionKind: 'daemon' | 'daemon-worker'

annotation.zh: Supervisor + Worker 架构，长生命周期后台服务
annotation.en: Supervisor + Worker architecture, long-lived background service

content.zh:
UDS 跨会话通信...
startUdsMessaging() → socket created
SendMessageTool: 'uds:/path/to.sock' 本地
                 'bridge:session_...' 远程
CROSS_SESSION_MESSAGE_TAG: '<cross-session-message>'
content.en:
UDS cross-session communication...
startUdsMessaging() → socket created
SendMessageTool: 'uds:/path/to.sock' local
                 'bridge:session_...' remote
CROSS_SESSION_MESSAGE_TAG: '<cross-session-message>'

annotation.zh: Unix Domain Socket 消息系统 + Bridge 远程寻址
annotation.en: Unix Domain Socket messaging system + Bridge remote addressing

content.zh:
Feature Flag 体系总结:

编译时门控 (bun:bundle DCE):
  ant build → feature() = true → 代码保留
  external build → feature() = false → 代码移除

运行时灰度 (GrowthBook):
  tengu_harbor, tengu_ultraplan_model...

30+ Flags · 209 处调用 · 199 个文件
content.en:
Feature Flag system summary:

Compile-time gating (bun:bundle DCE):
  ant build → feature() = true → code retained
  external build → feature() = false → code removed

Runtime gradual rollout (GrowthBook):
  tengu_harbor, tengu_ultraplan_model...

30+ Flags · 209 callsites · 199 files

annotation.zh: 双重控制 = 零意外暴露 + 精确灰度放量
annotation.en: Dual control = zero accidental exposure + precise gradual rollout
